data.text: Added MCP test coverage for `ddx_bead_blocked` and `ddx_bead_dep_tree` (including a missing-id error case) at cli/internal/server/server_test.go. Both tools were already implemented in the codebase but lacked functional tests; tests pass and pre-commit hooks (build, lint, test) green.
